On the mornings when Vanessa slept over at Joan’s,...

It was a balmy September night,...
Joan spent all of her time when she wasn’t training for her mission taking shifts in mission control.
The day Frances was leaving for boarding school,...
Joan understands what is going to happen before Vanessa says it.
Joan is sitting at her console in mission control and she cannot breathe.
Vanessa is looking out the window at a star that Joan would know the name of.
Vanessa is wondering if she’s lost the connection,...
They lose communication with Navigator seventeen seconds later.
